title: investigation.yaml
description: A named collection of Studies grouped under a shared research question, with an explicit cross-study dependency DAG and top-level acceptance criteria.

name.description: URL-safe slug that matches the directory name under investigations/.

status.description: Overall status of the investigation. 'planning' is accepted as an alias for 'planned' for back-compat.

question.description: The overarching research question answered by running all member studies in concert.

hypothesis.description: Predicted outcome across the full study sequence.

description.description: Markdown narrative: background, mechanism, study sequence, expected outcome.

studies.description: Ordered list of study slugs that belong to this investigation. Controls dashboard grouping/visibility. The DAG topology is derived from each study's own parent_studies field.

expert_docs.description: Names of expert_docs entries from workspace.yaml that are relevant to this investigation (cross-reference convenience, not authoritative).

acceptance_criteria.description: Top-level success criteria for the investigation. Each entry maps to a specific expected_behavior[i].name on a member study. The investigation is 'complete' when all entries pass.

study.description: Slug of the member study that owns this criterion.

behavior.description: The expected_behavior[i].name value on the named study.
